description: Discovery map for AI agents - automatic rule and dependency routing

knowledge.purpose: Task intent routing and knowledge navigation
read_when: Planning a new task or determining which files to read
Routing between different skill or workflow layers

metadata.purpose: Knowledge atom schema, ranking, confidence, and runtime metadata
read_when: Creating or evaluating a new knowledge atom

governance.purpose: Knowledge lifecycle, validation gates, and deprecation rules
read_when: Deciding if a rule or skill should be promoted, deprecated, or retired

intelligence.purpose: Engineering decision, trade-off, anti-pattern, and domain knowledge

workflow.purpose: Planning, decomposition, review, orchestration, and handoff flow
read_when: Designing handoff between agents or phases

feedback.purpose: Lesson extraction, refinement, promotion, and feedback loop
read_when: Extracting learnings from a task or failure
Need to promote a lesson to shared rules or workflow

memory.purpose: Episodic, project, and failure memory abstraction
read_when: Need to understand long-term memory design

when_starting_task: 2. Identify: Primary source from task routing table
4. Check: metadata/schema.md if creating new knowledge atom
when_stuck_or_uncertain: 4. Ask: user or document TODO in .agent-goals/

dont_do_this: ❌ Assume you know what file to read - consult knowledge/indexes first
❌ Create new rules without checking shared-rules/linked-updates.md
❌ Skip dependency reading when files might have changed
❌ Propose changes to shared-rules/ without validating against rule-weight.md

how_this_helps_ai.description: This discovery map enables 'smart exploration' without explicit instructions

examples.without_discovery: AI might guess or ask what to do
examples.with_discovery: AI reads knowledge/indexes/README.md and finds the routing automatically

examples.scenario: AI needs to create a rule
examples.without_discovery: AI might forget about linked updates
examples.with_discovery: AI checks discovery_rules.when_defining_rules and validates automatically

examples.scenario: AI is uncertain about next step
examples.without_discovery: AI gets stuck or asks user
